personal-assistant.name: Personal assistant
personal-assistant.description: A general-purpose assistant for your day, inbox, calendar, follow-ups, and recurring work.

blank.name: Start from scratch
blank.description: A blank agent with no pre-configured actions, instructions, or learnings. Build it your way.

bookkeeping.name: Bookkeeping
bookkeeping.description: Categorize transactions, reconcile accounts, close the books every month, and generate investor-ready financials. Connects to QuickBooks, Xero, Stripe, and your bank feeds. Drafts journal entries and statements, never posts to your ledger or moves money.

legal.name: Legal
legal.description: Review contracts, audit privacy compliance, prep Delaware filings, run trademark searches, and answer legal questions on the spot. Drafts NDAs, policies, and escalation briefs, never files, signs, or sends anything on your behalf.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: Build positioning, plan campaigns, write blog posts and landing pages, audit SEO and AI-search visibility, and draft email sequences. Strategy through execution across content, paid, social, and conversion copy, all drafts, never published.

operations.name: Operations
operations.description: Triage your inbox, prep meetings, track goals, manage vendor renewals, audit SaaS spend, and run data queries. Covers planning, scheduling, finance hygiene, and reporting, drafts only, never sends or commits.

people.name: People
people.description: Source and evaluate candidates, coordinate interview loops, draft offer letters, run review cycles, and track compliance deadlines. Covers hiring through retention, drafts only, never sends or modifies your HR systems.

sales.name: Sales
sales.description: Find leads, research accounts, prep calls, draft outreach, manage your CRM, and forecast pipeline. Covers prospecting through expansion, drafts only, never sends or changes deal stages without your approval.

support.name: Support
support.description: Triage tickets, draft replies, write help-center articles, score customer health, and build churn-save playbooks. Covers inbox through customer success, drafts only, never sends.

outbound.name: Outbound
outbound.description: Turn a single LinkedIn post into a paused cold email campaign in Instantly. I scrape the commenters or reactors, store them in Airtable, find verified emails through Apollo, co-write a 3-email sequence with you, then load it all into Instantly. The campaign always stays paused for your review, I never auto-launch.

empty.title: No agents yet
empty.description: Build your AI team and start a mission.

instructions.emptyDescription: Tell your agent how it should think and act.
instructions.helper: How this agent should think and act.

learnings.emptyDescription: The agent jots things down as it works, or you can add them yourself.
learnings.helper: Quick notes the agent picks up over time.
learnings.inputPlaceholder: Type a learning and press Enter…
learnings.confirmRemoveDescription: The agent will lose this note. You can add it back later.

agentSettings.colorHelper: Pick a color for your agent's avatar.
agentSettings.shareHelper: Send a copy of this agent to a friend.
agentSettings.dangerHelper: Permanently remove this agent and everything it has done. This cannot be undone.

projectContext.title: Project context
projectContext.description: Injected into all agents. Describe your project, conventions, and rules.
projectContext.placeholder: Project context, coding conventions, architecture notes...

agentPrompts.title: Agent prompts
agentPrompts.description: Each agent mode gets its own system prompt.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Reusable procedures the agents can run.

learnings.title: Learnings
learnings.description: Agents save learnings as they work. You can add them manually too.

settings.title: Settings
settings.worktreeModeDescription: Create a separate git worktree for each mission
settings.installCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm install, npm install, cargo build
settings.devCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm dev, npm run dev, cargo run

files.emptyDescription: Files created by your assistant will appear here.

preview.unsupportedTitle: No preview for this file type
preview.unsupportedDescription: Download it to open it on your computer.
